name: divide
description: Two factions forced to coexist in a walled settlement. Historical grievances run deep.
opening_events: The wall divides the settlement in two. The Northerners and the Southerners share a single water source.
An uneasy truce holds, but whispers of old betrayals circulate on both sides.

agents.name: Rowan
agents.goal: unite both factions under one banner

agents.name: Ash
agents.goal: defend the Southern quarter at any cost

agents.name: Flint
agents.goal: control the water source for the North

agents.name: Ember
agents.goal: build bridges between the children of both sides

agents.name: Thorne
agents.goal: avenge what the North did to my family
